description_text: Fitment: Universal Fitment, Please Measure Your Vehicle Length And Dimensions Prior to Purchasing Specification: Type:Rear Bumper Lip Diffuser Shark Fins Material:ABS Plastic Placement on Vehicle:Rear Features: Universal Lower Rear Body Bumper Diffuser Shark Fin.
